arch_family: multi-camera BEV → residual map fusion → Bezier planner + World Action Model JEPA auxiliary

nodes.title: Backbone — Swin V2 Tiny
nodes.desc: Pretrained 4-stage multi-scale feature extractor (96→768ch), shared with World Model
nodes.detail: Returns 4 feature maps at stages [96,192,384,768] channels. The last stage (768ch, 8×8) is used by FrameEncoder; all stages (1440ch total after pool) feed BEV fusion. Channels-last output is auto-permuted.

nodes.title: BEV View Fusion
nodes.desc: Pool+concat multi-scale features, project to 256ch, BEV spatial cross-attention via 3D→2D projection
nodes.detail: Learnable BEV queries (450×300 grid) attend to multi-camera 8×8 value maps at geometry-guided reference points with pillar sampling offsets. Visibility-masked averaging across cameras (BEVFormer SCA formula).

nodes.title: Map Encoder — Rasterized
nodes.desc: Swin V2 Tiny (random init) encodes nav-map to BEV-aligned spatial features
nodes.detail: Separate swinv2_tiny_window8_256 backbone (not pretrained), multi-scale pool to (450,300), 1×1 conv channel projection to 256.

nodes.title: Map BEV Fusion — Residual
nodes.desc: Per-channel gated addition: image_bev + alpha * map_bev (alpha init=0)

nodes.title: World Action Model
nodes.desc: FrameEncoder (backbone→GAP→proj 224d) + rolling FIFO buffer (4 frames at 1Hz) + aggregation
nodes.detail: Encodes current multi-view frame via shared backbone last-stage feature map → global average pool → linear proj to 224d. Detached embedding pushed to RollingHistoryBuffer; oldest→newest concatenation gives 4×224=896d visual_history for the planner.

nodes.title: Bezier Planner
nodes.desc: Context MLP (BEV+visual+ego → 256d) → 5 control points → fixed Bernstein basis expansion
nodes.detail: Additive context: ego_state_proj(256→256) + visual_history_proj(896→256) + bev_proj(spatial_mean→256). Context MLP (256→256→256). control_head predicts 5×2 Bezier control points. Bernstein basis [64,5] expands to smooth 64-step (acc, curvature) profiles.

nodes.title: Trajectory
nodes.desc: 64-step acceleration/curvature control profile (smooth by Bezier construction)

nodes.title: Future Feature Predictor
nodes.desc: Linear seed → spatial reshape → 4 independent 1×1 Conv2d heads predicting future backbone feature maps
nodes.detail: FutureFeatureMapPredictor: visual_history [B,896] → Linear → GELU → reshape [B,128,8,8] seed → 4 × Conv2d(128→768, 1×1) producing predicted future feature maps for JEPA.

nodes.title: Future Frames
nodes.desc: Ground-truth future camera observations at +1.6s intervals for JEPA target

nodes.title: JEPA Target Encoder
nodes.desc: Frozen deep-copy of backbone feature-map extractor (stop-gradient, no EMA)
nodes.detail: JepaTargetEncoder wraps BackboneFeatureMap(backbone, feature_hw=8) in mode='frozen'. Each future frame is independently encoded to a detached [B,768,8,8] target. Parameters never receive gradients.

nodes.title: JEPA Reconstruction Loss
nodes.desc: L1 feature-space distance between predicted and frozen-target future feature maps
nodes.detail: FeatureReconstructionLoss with loss_type='l1', 4 future steps, uniform temporal weights. Computed via WorldActionModel.jepa_loss() in the training loop (not inside forward()).
